# Issue Format

## Title
`[type] short description` — e.g. `[bug] VPC module fails on second apply`

## Type
<!-- Pick one -->
- [ ] feature
- [ ] bug-fix
- [ ] chore
- [ ] version-update

## Description
<!-- What is the problem or what needs to be built? Be specific. -->

## Why
<!-- Why does this need to be done? What breaks or what value does it add? -->

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- What does "done" look like? List the conditions that must be true to close this issue. -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Additional Context
<!-- Logs, screenshots, error messages, links — anything useful. -->
